name: Cursor / VS Code workspace lint (declared files only)
drp_note: Compares on-disk .code-workspace folder list to EAII PC-root registry entries that exist on disk. Does not detect which workspace Cursor currently has open.
hint: No workspace file found. Run: npm run workspace:emit-pc-root — then re-run, or set Z_WORKSPACE_LINT_FILES or --workspace=...
